lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: So there I was, minding my own business on the boat, when I feel us slow to a halt.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: This man walks over to me and says that it's my stop, absurd though that is.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: So they all sort of... toss me onto this island with a meagre amount of survival objects.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: I think they were laughing whilst they did it.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Either way, there I was. Alone. On this island.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: I'd paid quite handsomely for my passage too!

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: A tour to the rainforest, and then dinner in Tal Teklan.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: This crew were all so very willing to get me where I wanted to go.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Very helpful as they collected my belongings. Eager, even.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: It felt exclusive. I was the only passenger they took aboard.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: I do see now that I was perhaps foolish.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Drawn in by their charms, throwing money around.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: I just really wanted that dinner in Tal Teklan, you know?

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Now I'm going to die alone on an island, bereft of my worldly possessions.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Perhaps the bards of Temptestus[sic] will write of my sorrow, should they hear my tale.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Tell people of my struggles!

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Excuse me! Hello! I appear to have found myself in a situation here.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Can you see any way for me to... defamiliarise myself with this island?

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: I'm getting rather bored being stuck here waiting for the tide to swallow me.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Though, that is reliant on me not throwing myself into the dark sea first.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: But fear not! I shan't do that, for it would be improper.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Though if it rains again, I may be tempted.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Observe how I have nothing here on this island.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: There's myself and the occasional crab, but I've been left here... Abandoned! Forgotten!

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: I don't suppose you could send for a boat to retrieve me?

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Or perhaps an armada.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Yes, this predicament needs excessive force to be resolved peacefully.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Maybe I should pack a flag next time. Claim this land for myself.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: No! I can't be stuck here! It's far too small.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Are you finding the air just chokes you here? It is the air, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Gosh, it feels as if my skin is just crawling.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Nobody's going to find me here... I'm going to rot on this island alone.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: No, no, no!

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: My regular baker will realise I've not come by in a day. He will send a search party!

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: They will send a search party, won't they?

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: What if they don't?

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: Someone will know I'm missing.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: This island is too small though... They won't be able to see it.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: I'd start a fire, if only I had the tools to do so.

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: This isn't how I was meant to die!

lines.speaker: Felix
lines.text: I was meant to go down gloriously in the Colosseum!
